ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read all eligible role assignments and role schedules for your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read the eligible role-based access control (RBAC) assignments and schedules for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes reading directory role templates, and directory roles.
Read all eligible role assignments and role schedules for your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph
